descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.5 for sale 2019 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a catamaran combining performance, comfort and modern design, the Bali 4.5 for sale 2019 is an interesting option. Built by Catana Group and designed by Xavier Fay.

Principal Specifications

  • Builder: Catana Group
  • Model: Bali 4.5
  • Designer: Xavier Fay
  • Flag: Italian
  • Year Built: 2019

Dimensions

  • Length: 13.60m
  • Beam: 7.42m
  • Draft: 1.25m
  • Displacement: 11,800 kg

Deck & Cockpit

  • Hull Material: GRP
  • Hull Colour: White
  • Cockpit Teak: Yes, Flexiteek (2025)
  • Cockpit Cushions: Yes
  • Chine Material: GRP
  • Cockpit Table: Yes, wood
  • Bimini: Yes

Accommodation & Interior

  • Double Cabins: 4
  • Crew Cabin: 1
  • Bathrooms: 5 (4 guest + 1 crew)
  • Separate Showers: 4
  • Convertible Dinette Table: Yes
  • Stove: 3 burners
  • Oven: Yes
  • Refrigerator: Vertical with freezer and ice maker

Engines/Propulsion

  • Engines: 2 x Yanmar, 60hp each (2019)
  • Engine Hours: 1,400 (as of Dec 2025)
  • S-drive Transmission
  • Tank Capacity: 800L
  • Fixed Blade Propellers
  • Helm: Wheel steering

Electronics & Navigation

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Echo Sounder: Yes
  • Log/Tridata: Yes
  • Wind Station: Yes
  • Compasses: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes
  • Plotters: 2 units

Electrical & Comfort Systems

  • Voltage: 12/220V
  • Water Tanks: 2 (Total: 800L, PVC)
  • Bilge Pumps: 6 (4 electric, 2 manual)
  • Heating: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Boiler: Yes (for hot water)
  • Water Pump: Yes (autoclave)
  • Black Water System: Yes
  • External Shower: Yes
  • Generator: 9 kW unit

Sails & Rigging

  • Mast: Deck-stepped
  • Winches: 2
  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Vang: Yes
  • Furling Genoa: Yes

Tender & Safety

  • Tender: Highfield 3.10 classic with Yamaha 9.9hp outboard
  • Electric Windlass: Yes
  • Anchor & Chain: Yes
  • Mooring Lines: Supplied
  • Life Raft: Yes
  • Fenders: 8
  • Safety Equipment: Comprehensive

The Bali 4.5 for sale 2019 is well-appointed for comfort under sail or at anchor, with comprehensive navigation and safety features and comfortable living spaces. With her two-ownership history and ongoing maintenance, she represents a solid choice for those seeking a versatile catamaran in good condition. For more details or to arrange a visit, don't hesitate to contact us!
